constructs.instructions_verbatim: Please rate each word on a 1 to 7 scale, with 1 meaning the word evokes no sensory experience for you ... and 7 meaning the word evokes a strong sensory experience.
constructs.citation: Juhasz, B. J., & Yap, M. J. (2013). Sensory experience ratings for over 5,000 mono- and disyllabic words. Behavior Research Methods, 45, 111-120.
constructs.instructions_llm: Rate how strongly this word evokes any sensory experience. Range: 1-7 (1 = no sensory experience, 7 = strong sensory experience). Reply with one number.
